expected_condition: TP baseline comparison table must exist.
QP baseline comparison table must exist.
QP bounded metrics table must exist.
QP target variance diagnostic table must exist.
Persistence baseline must be reported for TP.
Persistence baseline must be reported for QP.
QP raw and bounded predictions must both be evaluated.
Bounded QP predictions must be within [0, 1].
Scenario-wise QP low-variance cases must be flagged.
Forbidden metadata/status/power columns must not be model inputs.
Future target columns must not be used as inputs.
scenario_name must be used only for grouped reporting.
